parameters-en.Feedback: Adds a bit of natural tape feedback, which can provide additional depth to your signal.
parameters-en.Flutter: Adds slight pitch fluctuations to the signal, which are caused by imperfections in the tape or tape drive mechanism.
parameters-en.Distortion: Adds a bit of warmth and grit to the warble.
parameters-en.Mix: Controls the blend between the Tape Eater effect and the dry signal. At 0%, no effect is heard; at 100%, no dry signal is heard.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
